mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( memberId, memberPw, role, memberStatus ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{role}, #{memberStatus} )

INSERT INTO memberInfo ( memberNo, nameH, nameK, phone, email, addNumber, adds, infoAdd, bookCount ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{nameH}, #{nameK}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{addNumber}, #{adds}, #{infoAdd}, #{bookCount} )
